# account

**Instance Property**

The unique identifier of the account, if any, to which the linked item belongs.

## Declaration

```swift
var account: Data?
```

## Accessing linked item properties

- **item**: The unique identifier of the item linked by this linked item.

items.description: The unique identifier of the item linked by this linked item.
items.name: item

title: account
